findings.worker_claim: Removed 3 dead Fastify dependencies (@fastify/swagger, @fastify/swagger-ui, @fastify/websocket), dropped 36 transitive packages
findings.evidence: Commit b156731 removes 3 packages from package.json, package-lock.json diff shows 471 lines removed (transitive deps). No TODO/FIXME/stub markers. Typecheck passes, 48 tests pass.

findings.worker_claim: Added cashu-ts melt flow integration test covering mint → melt → checkstate
findings.evidence: Commit 99dd8f1 adds 30-line melt integration test in cashu-ts.test.ts. Test covers: mint 32 sats, create melt invoice (31 sats + 1 fee), get melt quote, execute melt, verify proofs SPENT via NUT-07. Uses MeltQuoteState and CheckStateEnum imports. Real assertions (expect calls), no stubs/TODOs. Test is skipped without DATABASE_URL (correct behavior for integration test).

findings.worker_claim: Added 13 LndBackend unit tests with mocked gRPC client covering estimateFee, sendPayment, createInvoice, decodePayReq
findings.evidence: Commit 4782073 adds 321-line test file src/lightning/__tests__/lnd.test.ts. 13 tests all passing. 23 expect() assertions. Uses vi.hoisted + vi.mock for grpc-js, proto-loader, and fs — no real LND/TLS files needed. Covers: estimateFee (5 cases: success, ceil rounding, fallback on error, min-1-sat floor, DecodePayReq error), sendPayment (4 cases: success with fee, no payment_route, payment_error string, gRPC error), createInvoice (2 cases), decodePayReq (2 cases). No TODO/FIXME/stub markers anywhere.

context.summary: 3/3 tasks verified. All implementations match worker claims. Typecheck passes clean. 48 unit tests passing (up from 35), 25 skipped (integration tests needing DATABASE_URL). No stubs, TODOs, or fake implementations found. Test quality is high — LND tests have 23 assertions across 13 cases, melt integration test covers full lifecycle with proper state assertions.
